meta.title: S4x18 Closing Panel with Langner, Peterson and Tudor
meta.description:
The candid Closing Panel is always one of the most popular sessions at S4 in Miami South Beach. Here is the S4x18 edition with Dale Peterson's discussion with Ralph Langner of Langner Communication and Zach Tudor of INL.

They begin with a discussion of what the Triton attack means and then discuss what the ICS security community needs to work on that was not addressed at the event ... and other things.
